contributor_summaries.Aguilex: Control Flow Guard for all Windows native DLLs; BufferSecurityCheck for native DLLs to resolve BinSkim BA2007

preview_summaries.p3: Preview 3 carried Spectre mitigation flag for libSkiaSharp.dll. (#3496).

preview_summaries.p1: Preview 1 carried Preserve and pack the Android symbols; missing tvOS `SKSurface.Create` overloads; the generator slightly.
